data.title: Primex Inc. appoints Chris Brown as Head of Sales for OneVue Sense to target new markets, fueling higher growth.
data.description: Primex Inc. has decided to boost its environmental monitoring solution, OneVue Sense®, with the appointment of a new Head of Sales. Based in LAKE GENEVA, Wis., this move took place on Feb. 17, 2026. The company is aiming to expand into new market sectors and achieve increased growth. With multiple technologies at the helm, Primex aims to enhance its presence in the market.

data.title: 72% report strong talent pool, but 50% struggle with skills gap. Techreviewer's 2025 IT Labor Market Report reveals evolving tech outpaces workforce development.
data.description: A recent report by Techreviewer revealed a notable skills gap in the IT labor market in 2025 in Manchester, Conn. The report highlights the challenge of technology advancing at a rapid pace compared to workforce development efforts. This disparity between technological progress and skills acquisition indicates a pressing need for upskilling and reskilling initiatives to bridge the gap. The study underscores the urgency for organizations to invest in training and development programs to ensure their workforce remains competitive in the ever-changing tech landscape.

data.title: United Vein & Vascular Centers opens new clinic in Mesa, Arizona, expanding access to vein & vascular care.
data.description: In Mesa, Arizona, on February 17, 2026, United Vein & Vascular Centers (UVVC) unveiled its latest clinic, marking a significant step in enhancing access to advanced outpatient vein and vascular treatments. The expansion in Mesa, Arizona, underscores UVVC's commitment to providing top-notch care to individuals in the region. This development reflects UVVC's esteemed position as a premier provider of minimally invasive vein and vascular care on a national scale.

CEO INFLATION EXPECTATIONS DIP TO 3.1% A Cleveland Federal Reserve survey shows CEOs now expect 3.1% inflation over the next 12 months, down from 3.3% in Q4. Expectations have steadily fallen since 3.9% in Q2 2025 amid rising tariffs.

data.title: Sparx Hockey named Official Skate Sharpener of MSHSL and The Tourney in Minnesota, Feb. 17, 2026. #PRNewswire #StPaul
data.description: In St. Paul, Minnesota on February 17, 2026, Sparx Hockey, a top provider of automated skate sharpening technology, revealed its new title as the Official Skate Sharpener for the Minnesota State High School League (MSHSL) and The Tourney, a renowned high school hockey event in Minnesota. The company's designation solidifies its position as a key player in the industry, highlighting its commitment to quality and innovation.

data.title: WiCyS launches AI Security Accelerator Program in Maryland, aiming to train women with in-demand AI security skills to protect digital infrastructure.
data.description: A recent program in COOKEVILLE, Tenn., starting on Feb. 17, 2026, aims to provide valuable AI security skills to women who are unemployed, underemployed, or currently working. The initiative focuses on equipping participants with essential skills to safeguard the country's digital infrastructure against new AI-driven threats. This effort is led by Women in CyberSecurity (WiCyS) and aims to significantly enhance the cybersecurity workforce by training a large number of women in this critical field.

data.title: Republic of Panama's tender offer for outstanding global bonds expired on Feb. 13, 2026, in New York City at 5:00 p.m.
data.description: In Panama City, Panama, on February 17, 2026, the Republic of Panama's previous tender offer was made to purchase its outstanding global bonds. The offer, which included Old Bonds listed in a provided table, expired at 5:00 p.m., New York City time, on February 13, 2026. The Offer Document, dated February 9, 2026, outlined the terms and conditions of the Offer. Any capitalized terms not defined in this communication can be found in the Offer Document.

data.title: altafiber has provided fiber to 70,000 Dayton addresses, investing $20 million so far in this project reaching a total of $200 million.
data.description: In Dayton, Ohio, altafiber has completed half of its fiber build, making their advanced multi-gig XGS-PON fiber network accessible to 70,000 households and companies. The tech firm's investment in the Dayton area, covering Montgomery County, Greene County, Franklin Township, Springboro Township, and Clearcreek Township, amounts to around $20 million.

data.title: ExxonMobil's Senior VP to speak at Morgan Stanley Energy & Power Conference on March 3, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: In Spring, Texas, Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE: XOM) revealed that Jack Williams, the Senior Vice President, is set to lead a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley Energy & Power Conference in New York on March 3, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET. The event can be live-streamed by visiting the event page. A recording of the webcast will be accessible on the ExxonMobil website around 24 hours post-event. ExxonMobil is among the most prominent publicly traded international companies.

data.title: Music Will celebrates 11 years of impact with annual benefit concert at Garcia's Chicago. Fundraiser supports expanding music education in Chicago public schools.
data.description: A fundraiser event is being organized on Thursday by Music Will, the nation's largest nonprofit music program in U.S. public schools, to support the expansion of modern music education in Chicago Public Schools. This event marks the 11th Annual Music Will Benefit Chicago and aims to raise funds for the cause. The event is scheduled to take place on February 17, 2026, in Chicago. This initiative seeks to enhance music education in public schools and promote the development of musical talents among students.

data.title: Understood.org partners with Davos Neurodiversity Summit for podcast on neurodiversity in business with 70M Americans supported.
data.description: In the latest season, discussions with neurodivergent leaders and allies delve into the blend of neurodiversity, business, and culture. The season, set in New York and slated for release on Feb. 17, 2026, aims to shed light on the experiences of the 70 million individuals in the U.S. who are neurodivergent. Understood.org, a prominent nonprofit organization, spearheads this initiative.

data.title: CT-guided intervention market to reach USD 2.2B by 2035, growing at 7.4% CAGR, driven by navigation systems and tumor biopsy. India emerging as expansion hub.
data.description: Newark, Delaware - On February 17, 2026, it was reported that CT-guided interventions have transitioned from being considered "optional imaging support" to a vital part of core clinical infrastructure. This shift is being driven by the integration of navigation systems, the increasing use of tumor biopsies, and the growing adoption of these procedures in hospitals. India has emerged as a significant hub for the expansion of CT-guided interventions. This advancement marks a significant change in the medical field, with key numbers indicating a substantial increase in the utilization of CT-guided interventions worldwide.

data.title: Global Intragastric Balloons market set to hit $115.3M by 2033 with 13.6% CAGR, driven by obesity rates rise and healthcare spending surge.
data.description: The global market is experiencing growth driven by an increase in obesity rates and healthcare spending, emphasizing the need for lifestyle changes. A recent report by Allied Market Research, released on February 17, 2026 in WILMINGTON, Del., focuses on the 'Intragastric Balloons Market'. This market is expected to show significant growth in response to these factors.

data.title: Fox World Travel renews commitment to Travelport's tech platform. Travelport powers bookings for many suppliers worldwide.
data.description: A prominent travel management company in North America has reaffirmed its dedication to Travelport's advanced technology platform on February 17, 2026 in London. Travelport, a global provider of multiple sources of travel content facilitating bookings for a vast network of over hundreds of thousands of travel providers worldwide, announced the news.
